rationale: This anime power-up hook has zero connection to Mob Control's core loop of cannon-aiming, multiplier gates, and crowd growth — viewers won't understand what game they're being sold. The palette overlaps slightly on cyan/yellow but lacks the signature royal purple, and using Goku IP raises serious copyright/trademark risk that the publishing team should not greenlight. Audience skews male-casual which weakly aligns, but freshness is poor (619d, single advertiser, velocity 0.048) indicating this is a stale, untested concept — skip or, at most, test only a heavily reworked "charge-up into mob explosion" satisfaction beat that swaps the IP for in-game units passing through gates.
